_note: The campaign is just beginning. Named NPCs will be added here as they are introduced in play. The entries below represent known institutional figures from the wiki.

master-of-revels.name: The Master of Revels
master-of-revels.description: A senior Masquer who has chaired the Festival Committee that oversees the annual Autumn Masquerade for as long as anyone can remember. The identity of this person, and whether 'as long as anyone can remember' should be taken literally, are both open questions.
master-of-revels.role: Oversees the Autumn Masquerade. Sits on the Festival Committee. Has access to the Sodality's third-floor workshop.
known_facts: Has held this position for an unusually long time
Senior rank in the Masquers' Sodality
Controls significant aspects of the Masquerade's planning and execution

undertow-owner.name: Unknown
undertow-owner.description: The identity of the Undertow's actual owner is one of Venturia's persistent mysteries. Some say it has been the same person for two hundred years — which would make them either very long-lived or very good at succession planning.
undertow-owner.role: Owner and ultimate authority of the Undertow gambling establishment. Controls a treasury of extracted memories, recorded secrets, and owed favors.
known_facts: Has maintained the establishment's strict rules for generations
Controls significant leverage over many Venturian citizens

fog-warden-captain.name: Unknown
fog-warden-captain.description: The commanding officer of the Fog Wardens at the Overlook. Responsible for maintaining the boundary watch and documenting the increasingly strange behavior of the Vallombrosa fog.
fog-warden-captain.role: Garrison commander. Has access to the full historical logs of fog activity.
known_facts: The garrison logs under their command document significant anomalies in fog behavior
Must make decisions about how much of what they observe to report upward
